## Summary

All three workbench header buttons (Reset Queue, TrustedPath, Final Review / Apply & Export) now share consistent styling so they render as a uniform row regardless of screen width.

**Changes:**
- **ResetQueueButton**: `text-center` wrapper → `relative`, button gets `flex h-10 items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap`
- **TrustedPathWorkbenchButton**: Removed `text-center` from wrapper, button gets `flex h-10 items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap`
- Both now match the existing Final Review link's `h-10 flex items-center` pattern

## Scope

- `components/revision/ResetQueueButton.tsx` — consistent height/alignment
- `components/revision/TrustedPathWorkbenchButton.tsx` — consistent height/alignment

Does NOT touch: page.tsx container, pipeline logic, API routes, scoring, governance.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Pure CSS styling change. No logic changes.
- Confirm popup positioning uses `absolute right-0` which remains relative to the new `relative` wrapper (unchanged behavior).
